textByHash.d62b7249161e44e751f41806a7e083146c886f82: I am the head secretary of the Brown Engine.
textByHash.e98171d662539cd702755d39f29b50caf37dc0ac: The Brown Engine. We are one of the eight major mining companies, but our standard is higher than that of all the others.
textByHash.5e7a2e53cf1e28bfa9fb1150105c6deb89f09a7a: Our policy is strictly gentlemen only, you see.
textByHash.d7834c081748f83796654ca242f900b8519a5528: Oh, my dear, please don't take it personally.
textByHash.dfa913f3eaa4761e2ff63325586dfa6cf461e9c3: The Brown Engine is a gentleman only society, I'm afraid.
textByHash.f8dc2382a8cd9440b32b9bfa009880fe6ae4d9ce: What can I do for you, human?
textByHash.a144cc2f4bf59221bd4a195df6a32925ed9c6d50: Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.457d1ff467ccdd679c31b8df83496f1d8587e68c: What did you need of the White Chisel?
textByHash.f81408ee00fdfa74cf53a4b5d5724e2b4b7f7848: Is there anything you need assistance with?
textByHash.7d1db62e3f8e0bb23c31071f5d2090259b1e739c: And what can I do for you?
textByHash.e1cc3c47606681d73ab10cecbc8a2b89ac3895b6: I am the head secretary of the White Chisel.
textByHash.a1d1e0b28c4318af67e37325f8d5fbe8433d5e40: The Brown Engine. We are one of the eight major mining companies, and one of the finest if I do say so myself!
textByHash.85b904075265b401d00c9fb73bce51179ed72242: These are the offices of the Brown Engine.
textByHash.1c2e331b43b2d88880340124c77571f8db6994f7: This is the official residence of the Brown Engine.
textByHash.08ade62d2ecf849ef9887750aebcff95746712da: Why, you are in the headquarters of the Brown Engine.
textByHash.c51b2d37f0a6f2d9dc26f7e8c90c8c60e81711da: We share this floor of the palace with the other companies of the Consortium. And trade with them on the Trade Octagon.
textByHash.67251bf14bca94c19c65377279336a931e237cd3: See those traders out there, just out the door? They're all standing in the Trade Octagon. There's an awful lot of trade going on in the palace, you know.
textByHash.ffab49546a46af2d1e82185d63b73d402ff57cd6: You will have to find that out on your own, I'm afraid. I do have more work to do.
